description_long: This is a classic cinnamon roll muffin with a soft, pillowy dough spiraled around a cinnamon-sugar filling. The entire surface is generously coated in a glossy, semi-translucent glaze that gives it a slightly shiny appearance. The spiral shape is prominent, with the inner coil slightly raised above the outer edge, and the muffin has a rounded, slightly irregular form. The exterior is a pale golden color, with hints of deeper brown where the cinnamon filling peeks through. It sits atop a square piece of patterned paper with a blue geometric design. The muffin appears fresh, moist, and inviting, with a texture that looks tender and easy to tear apart.
description: A soft, spiral-shaped cinnamon roll muffin coated in glossy glaze, sitting on a blue-patterned paper. The muffin is pale golden with visible cinnamon swirls and a moist, inviting texture.
description_view_0: Front view shows the spiral top and thick glaze, with the muffin's rounded side and the blue-patterned paper beneath.
description_view_1: This view highlights the flatter side of the muffin and the even distribution of glaze, with the spiral top more centered.
description_view_2: The spiral is more pronounced from this angle, and the glaze appears slightly thicker on the side facing the viewer.
description_view_3: This view shows a visible crack in the glaze and dough, with the spiral top slightly off-center and the muffin's side more prominent.
attribute_wrapper_pattern: blue geometric pattern on white paper
